title: Fresh Projectiles
description:
this ressource pack makes minecraft projectiles 3d
"more soon!!!!"
body:
# Fresh Projectiles

**Fresh Projectiles** improves the look of Minecraft projectiles by giving them a cleaner and more detailed style while staying close to the vanilla feeling.

## Current Projectiles

In the first version, the following projectiles have been updated:

* Egg (Normal)
* Blue Egg
* Brown Egg
* Ender Pearl
* Fireball
* Snowball
* Wind charge


## Notes

This is the **first version** of the pack. Not all projectiles have been updated yet, and a few visual issues may still exist. These will likely be improved or fixed in future updates.

## Future Plans

* Add more projectile textures
* Improve existing models and textures
* Fix small visual issues

## Compatibility

Works with Minecraft resource packs and should be compatible with most mods unless they change projectile textures.

---

If you find any issues or have suggestions, feel free to report them.
